roadmap_item: R-015 Locked prospective or held-out scientific predictions
model_family: ASH branch-centered synthetic-readiness model, R012-R014 accepted assumptions

predictions.title: Late-time branch-entropy expansion residual
predictions.observable: Delta_H_over_H relative to matched flat LCDM with same H0 and Omega_m
predictions.falsification_rule: Falsify this locked branch if a preregistered external expansion-data likelihood with matched LCDM baseline and published covariance excludes every point of the locked envelope at Delta chi^2 >= 9 while the matched LCDM baseline remains acceptable.
held_out_data_classes: held-out Type-Ia SN distance-ladder-free residual compilation

predictions.title: Finite-shell matter-spectrum residual template
predictions.falsification_rule: Falsify if a held-out matter-sector likelihood with the specified broadband nuisance model finds no nonzero shell-template amplitude and excludes the locked alpha_mu=0.07 template at Delta chi^2 >= 9.
held_out_data_classes: future/reprocessed matter power summary with covariance

predictions.title: Low-ell finite-parity even/odd proxy sign
predictions.observable: compressed low-ell shell/parity asymmetry statistic A_2_30

locked_numeric_claim.sign: positive in the frozen proxy convention

predictions.falsification_rule: Falsify if a held-out low-ell likelihood using the locked compression and covariance excludes the positive-sign parity statistic at >=3 sigma after look-elsewhere corrections declared in the preregistration.
held_out_data_classes: simulated null sky ensemble generated before unblinding

mutation_policy: After the freeze date, prediction numerical claims, domains, nuisance policies, and falsification rules may only be superseded by new IDs; original entries remain immutable.
